## Gate Checklist

- [ ] G1: IC > 0.01
- [ ] G2: IC sign consistent across windows
- [ ] G3: No confounding factors (check corr with vol, momentum)
- [ ] G4: Quintile monotonicity
- [ ] G5: Symbol breadth (works on 2+ symbols)
- [ ] G6: corr < 0.3 with existing factors
